name: Sequwan Olivera
bio: Visionary leader and founder of the S.I.L.O. Foundation. Sequwan drives the mission forward with passion and dedication to breast cancer awareness on Long Island.

name: Jeffery Comiskey
bio: Co-founder and director who brings community connections and event expertise. Jeffery is the heart behind many of our signature fundraisers.

name: Ethan Carpenter
bio: Manages the foundation's finances with transparency and integrity, ensuring every dollar goes toward making a difference.
